race.comment: EMPRESS OF JAPAN (7) has gotten better with each run this time in work and looks to be building up to another victory. Gets 2kg off, draws low and appears to be ready for the step-up in trip now. Goes on top. GO MARO (4) has placed two from two over this distance range and is another to get some weight relief. Can make his presence felt. Former Victorian BLACK EYED BLONDE (8) has had a win and a placing from two starts since joining the new stable and will be ready to peak now third run back from the spell. Top three candidate. GOLDEN EYES (13) is a last-start winner who shouldn't be slept on.
